subtitle.ja: 人差し指の構えから始めます。左右の人差し指を向こう側に1回転させて糸をねじります
subtitle.en: Begin with the "Opening A". With both thumbs, pick up the near little-finger string by moving over the two index strings.

subtitle.ja: 両方の親指で、人差し指の2本の糸を超えて小指の手前の糸を取ります
subtitle.en: With both thumbs, move over and pick down the far index-finger strings.

subtitle.ja: 両方の中指で、親指の向こう側の糸を取ります
subtitle.en: With both middle fingers, pick up the far thumb string from below.

subtitle.ja: 両方の親指の糸を全て外します
subtitle.en: Release all strings from both thumbs.

subtitle.ja: 両方の親指で、人差し指の手前の糸を押し下げて、小指の向こう側の糸を取ります
subtitle.en: With both thumbs, press down the near index string and pick up the far little-finger string.

subtitle.ja: 両方の小指の糸を全て外します
subtitle.en: Release all strings from both little fingers.

subtitle.ja: 両方の親指で、人差し指の2本の糸を押し下げて中指の向こう側の糸を取ります
subtitle.en: With both thumbs, press down the two index strings and pick up the far middle-finger string.

subtitle.ja: 左中指の輪を右手で持って外し、ねじれを無くして人差し指にかけます
subtitle.en: Remove the left middle-finger loop with the right hand, untwist it, and place it on the index finger.

subtitle.ja: 右中指の輪を左手で持って外し、ねじれを無くして人差し指にかけます
subtitle.en: Remove the right middle-finger loop with the left hand, untwist it, and place it on the index finger.

subtitle.ja: 左手の親指と人差し指にかかっている上の糸を残したまま、下の糸を外します
subtitle.en: On the left hand, keep the upper string that runs between the thumb and index finger, and release the lower one.

subtitle.ja: 右手の親指と人差し指にかかっている上の糸を残したまま、下の糸を外します
subtitle.en: On the right hand, keep the upper string that runs between the thumb and index finger, and release the lower one.

subtitle.ja: 両手の親指で、親指の向こう側の糸を上から取って完成です。親指の手前側の糸は自然に外れます
subtitle.en: With both thumbs, move over and pick down the far thumb strings to complete the figure; the near thumb strings fall away naturally.
